nasb.text: And He ordered us to preach to the people, and solemnly to testify that this is the One who has been appointed by God as Judge of the living and the dead.

esv.text: And he commanded us to preach to the people and to testify that he is the one appointed by God to be judge of the living and the dead.

cnv.text: 他吩咐我們向人民傳講，鄭重證明他是　神所立，審判活人死人的主。

ccb.text: 祂命令我们向世人传道，见证祂就是上帝指派来审判活人和死人的那位。

csbs.text: 耶稣还吩咐我们要向民众传道，郑重地见证他就是神所设定的那一位，活人和死人的审判者。
